CMS produces three versions of the ESRD file each year using various data inputs for the model; therefore for each 
beneficiary there are three records in the annual ESRD file. CCW derived a field called the MOF diagnosis input file 
source code (MOF_DGNS_INPUT_CD) in the MOFs to identify the three versions. Table 5 describes the field values. 

Table 5. Identified versions of the MOF diagnosis input file source code 

Valid values Value descriptions 
PPME Encounter, FFS, RAPS
